sessions: Run the test suite and report how many tests pass. Do not change any code.
Find where the library decides that an attribute has no default value, and add a short comment above that code explaining the rule in your own words.
Add a test that asserts instantiating a class without a mandatory attribute raises TypeError. Put it in a new file tests/test_required_probe.py.
Run the full suite again. If anything you added fails, fix your own test.
